textByHashes.5752818fcd3b8d85a88104d9812d90be323f05d9: Wooooooo woo! Wooooo woo wooooo woowoowoo woo Woo wooo. Wooooo woo woo? Woooooooooooooooooo!
textByHashes.3b0b120bc019f984484b4a80122a6c602afc34bb: It seems likely, but I've no recollection of this conversation.
textByHashes.8a3b46dbf1e3b0d1abb0e6479b65e6dde07eb0c8: Died? I guess some memories have faded, but my death still lingers within me.
textByHashes.53f04cbd6a33d1fcf2541c2c7185c0030d44b9a5: I was minding my own business while digging a grave when suddenly there was a loud metallic sound.
textByHashes.a85663f59b4e6fb2783586c883df0ae1b9e8ed22: I was dead... I recall seeing a man a few yards from me, speaking out loud, yet nobody else was around...
textByHashes.2ddc2923df497b0240ffd188e0021d7fb16b2afb: I thought I could hear a woman's voice respond, but it was likely just the wind.
textByHashes.98a9885fc6bb9a5cf8e37e0f0db354d7a3051e37: I wouldn't think on it too long. I'd just died, my emotions were unbearable.
textByHashes.27a7b779da0dae2e342e9715f94ea90c1b950a4d: Please do. My name? It's um... Sander.
